message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field '__sk_common' read through pointer of type sock in psmgr_create(). This type is freed in psmgr_release() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field '__sk_common' read through pointer of type sock in psmgr_create(). This type is freed in sock_put() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
